eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Mississippi; at 4:48 AM on AUG 5, 2019 Effective until 5:48 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Monthly Test of the Mississippi Emergency Alert System This is a required monthly test of the Mississippi Emergency Alert System by the Mississippi Emergency Management Agency.

In the event of an actual emergency, stay tuned to this station for important emergency information.

Again, this is only a test of the EAS by the Mississippi Emergency Management Agency.
